data.title: AerCap Concludes Q1 With Impressive Fleet Transactions And Financing
data.description: AerCap Holdings N.V. (AER) reported strong Q1 2025 financial and operational updates, including 112 lease agreements and a $0.27/share dividend.

data.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From Levi Strauss Stock Ahead Of Q1 Earnings
data.description: According to data from Benzinga Pro, Levi Strauss projects quarterly revenue at $1.54 billion, compared to $1.56 billion a year earlier.

data.title: Why Is EV Maker Mullen Automotive Stock Surging Today?
data.description: Mullen Automotive confirms its EVs, including Bollinger models, are fully assembled in the U.S. and not impacted by new vehicle tariffs. With over 67% of components sourced domestically, Mullen aims to maintain stable pricing and support fleet electrification for businesses seeking clean, cost-effective solutions.

data.title: Coinbase Stock Drops Into A Death Cross: Will XRP Futures Be Its Comeback Catalyst?
data.description: Coinbase Global Inc. (NASDAQ:COIN) has just flashed a dreaded Death Cross, the technical indicator that sends shivers down bullish spines.

data.title: China Retaliates With 34% Tariff On All US Imports, Urges Trump To Immediately Cancel The Tariffs, Calls For Negotiation
data.description: China's finance ministry has announced a 34% tariff on all goods imported from the U.S., effective from April 10. This decision comes as a response to the U.S. administration's earlier imposed duties.
